title: Pediatrics Department at UHDC Dehradun
description: The Pediatrics Department at UHDC Dehradun provides comprehensive care for children's health conditions. Our team of experienced specialists offers a wide range of diagnostic and treatment options, ensuring the best possible outcomes for our patients.

content.overview: The Department of Pediatrics at Uttaranchal Hospital & Diagnostic Centre (UHDC), Dehradun provides comprehensive healthcare services for infants, children, and adolescents. The department is supported by experienced pediatricians, trained nursing staff, and modern medical infrastructure to ensure safe, effective, and compassionate care.We offer a wide range of services, including newborn care, immunization, growth and developmental monitoring, management of acute and chronic illnesses, nutritional guidance, and pediatric emergency care. The department is equipped with advanced diagnostic facilities and neonatal support systems to manage both routine and critical cases efficiently.Our approach is based on evidence-based allopathic practices, focusing on early diagnosis, preventive healthcare, and family-centered treatment while maintaining the highest standards of patient safety and clinical excellence.At UHDC, we are committed to supporting the healthy growth and well-being of every child through quality pediatric care.

faq.question: What age group is seen here?
faq.answer: The Pediatrics department focuses on children’s health and care needs, including consultations and treatment support for younger patients.

faq.question: Can I bring my child for a routine visit?
faq.answer: Yes. Routine visits are useful for general checks, follow-up care, and discussing any concerns about growth or health.

faq.question: Are diagnostic evaluations available?
faq.answer: Yes. The department can support diagnostic evaluation when a child needs further assessment before treatment is decided.
